description: List-form subprocess replaced with f-string + shell=True, enabling shell injection via user input.
diff:
diff --git a/convert.py b/convert.py
--- a/convert.py
+++ b/convert.py
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 def run_convert(input_file):
-    cmd = ["convert", input_file, "-resize", "800x600", "output.png"]
-    subprocess.run(cmd, check=True)
+    cmd = f"convert {input_file} -resize 800x600 output.png"
+    subprocess.run(cmd, shell=True, check=True)
